title: Test application and fix identified issues

requirements.text: Test the searchByProductTitle functionality in the backend with various Persian product queries (e.g., 'گوشی موبایل', 'لپ‌تاپ', 'کتاب') and verify that results are returned with correct title, price, store name, and city information
acceptanceCriteria: Backend returns valid Product[] array for Persian search queries
Each product contains non-empty title, price > 0, storeName, and valid city
Search handles special Persian characters correctly

requirements.text: Test the frontend SearchInput component to ensure text input accepts Persian characters correctly and triggers search when clicking the search button or pressing Enter
acceptanceCriteria: Text input field accepts and displays Persian characters properly
Search triggers on Enter key press
Search triggers on button click
Loading state appears during search execution

requirements.text: Test the ProductResults component to verify that search results display correctly with product images, Persian titles, prices in Toman, store names, city badges, reputation stars, and clickable external links
acceptanceCriteria: All product cards render with correct layout in RTL direction
Product images display or show placeholder on load failure
Prices format correctly with Persian numerals and 'تومان' suffix
External links open in new tabs
Empty state shows when no results found

requirements.text: Test the StoreManagement component to ensure users can add new stores with Persian names and URLs, select Iranian cities from the dropdown, set reputation scores, and delete added stores
acceptanceCriteria: Form accepts Persian store names
URL validation works correctly
City dropdown displays all Iranian cities
Reputation slider updates value display
New stores appear in the list after submission
Delete button removes stores from the list

requirements.text: Fix any RTL layout issues in the UI where text alignment, spacing, or component positioning does not correctly support right-to-left Persian content
acceptanceCriteria: All text aligns to the right by default
Icons and buttons position correctly for RTL
Margins and paddings respect RTL direction
Grid layouts flow right-to-left

requirements.text: Fix any issues with the blue neon styling theme to ensure consistent application across all interactive elements including buttons, input fields, cards, and hover states
acceptanceCriteria: Blue neon glow effects appear on focus and hover states
Color consistency matches the defined OKLCH color scheme
Shadow effects render correctly in both light and dark modes
No style conflicts or missing CSS variables

requirements.text: Verify that the image upload functionality in SearchInput displays the upload button icon correctly and shows a preview when an image is selected, even though image-based search is not yet implemented in the backend
acceptanceCriteria: Image upload icon renders and is clickable
File input accepts image files only
Image preview displays after file selection
User receives appropriate feedback that image search will be available in future updates

requirements.text: Test navigation between Search view and Store Management view using the header buttons to ensure smooth transitions and state preservation
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'جستجو' button shows SearchInput and ProductResults components
Clicking 'مدیریت فروشگاه‌ها' button shows StoreManagement component
Active view button has distinct visual styling
Previous search results persist when switching back to search view

constraints: Do not modify the backend/main.mo actor structure
Do not edit read-only paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Keep all Motoko logic in the single main actor file
Maintain Persian language for all UI text
nonGoals: Implementing actual image-based search functionality in backend
Integrating real API connections to Iranian stores
Adding sorting or filtering controls for search results
